## Description

A clear description of what the bug is. What were you trying to do?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `ghostpath ...`
2. See error / unexpected output

## Expected behavior

What should have happened?

## Actual behavior

What actually happened? Paste the full terminal output, including any error
codes, hint messages, and stack traces.

```
paste output here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| GhostPath version | `ghostpath --version` |
| Node.js version | `node --version` |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 |
| Shell | e.g. zsh, bash, PowerShell |

## Ghostfile.json (if relevant)

Paste a minimal `Ghostfile.json` that reproduces the issue. Redact any secrets.

```json

```

## Additional context

Anything else that might be relevant — recent changes to your project, whether
this worked in a previous version, etc.
